name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inaccurate billing causes late fees and service interruptions. We monitor utility bill payments and flag anomalies instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem_solved: Inaccurate utility bill payments leading to late fees and service interruptions.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate utility bill payments leading to late fees and service interruptions.
